text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hey there, Trainer! ♪ Toughness bars are on sale
right now, you know. And guess what?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: For extra hard workers like you, they're free!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
You know how you forget to eat during work
sometimes? You know, so you don't want to
waste time. That's exactly when a hearty snack
like this comes in handy.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and be sure to tell me what you think after
you try them. My manager wants opinions before
we expand the sales area. So yeah, let me
know! ♪
